clarified_problem: Develop a robust and scalable platform to help marketing teams efficiently create and manage links for online campaigns.
ambiguities: What defines 'enterprise-ready'? How will the platform be designed to handle large-scale operations?
How should the link management system integrate with other marketing tools and platforms? What level of integration is required?
assumptions: The platform will support multiple types of links (e.g., direct, affiliate, dynamic).
Link creation and management must be user-friendly for non-technical users.
The system should include analytics features to track link performance.

tasks.title: LLM Task 1
tasks.description: Define clear roles and permissions for different user levels within the platform.

ai_assist.prompt: Refine this task into implementation steps: Define clear roles and permissions for different user levels within the platform.
ai_assist.expected_ai_output: Draft implementation artifacts that require engineer review before acceptance.

tasks.engineer_validation: Confirm the task output is technically correct, scoped, and testable.

tasks.title: LLM Task 2
tasks.description: Create an API contract that outlines how other systems can interact with the link platform.

ai_assist.prompt: Refine this task into implementation steps: Create an API contract that outlines how other systems can interact with the link platform.
ai_assist.expected_ai_output: Draft implementation artifacts that require engineer review before acceptance.

tasks.engineer_validation: Confirm the task output is technically correct, scoped, and testable.

tasks.title: LLM Task 3
tasks.description: Design a task summary page that lists all links created by users, including details like creation date, clicks, and target URL.

ai_assist.prompt: Refine this task into implementation steps: Design a task summary page that lists all links created by users, including details like creation date, clicks, and target URL.
ai_assist.expected_ai_output: Draft implementation artifacts that require engineer review before acceptance.

tasks.engineer_validation: Confirm the task output is technically correct, scoped, and testable.

artifacts.api_contract: A detailed document outlining API endpoints, request/response formats, authentication methods, etc.
artifacts.task_summary: L1: LLM Task 1 | L2: LLM Task 2 | L3: LLM Task 3
test_plan: Automated tests to verify link creation, management, and analytics features.
User acceptance testing (UAT) with marketing team representatives.
artifacts.documentation: A comprehensive user guide explaining how to use the platform effectively.
artifacts.requirement: An updated version of the requirement document incorporating clarifications from ambiguous scenarios.

checks: All core artifact sections are present.
Task dependency graph is internally consistent.
risks: Test plan may be insufficient for broad behavioral coverage.
AI-assisted execution traceability is weak; add notes on prompt and review decisions.
AI-generated tasks can miss hidden constraints unless manually reviewed.
Performance and abuse protection controls are not production-complete in this prototype.
